title: EB and CC on the latest - Language change
scenario: Companion Card pop-up appears incorrectly on Device Home Screen after language change via Device Settings when CC firmware is already up to date
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Device Settings for the connected Poly device
Select Language and change to a different language (e.g., English → French)
Confirm the language change and return to the Home screen
If prompted, complete any pending firmware update for the device
After firmware update completes, observe the Home screen for the Companion Card (CC) pop-up card
expected: The CC (Companion Card) pop-up card should NOT appear on the Device Home Screen, as the CC firmware is already up to date.
